Why Choose Kwibuka Modest?

What makes my work stand out from the rest

Artistic Eye

Every shot is composed with intention — light, emotion, and story in every frame.

Wedding Expert

Specialized in capturing the raw emotion and beauty of your special day.

Fast Delivery

Edited photos delivered within 48-72 hours. No long waiting periods.

Social Media Ready

All content optimized for Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok formats.

Professional

Punctual, discreet, and easy to work with at any event or shoot.

Rwanda & Beyond

Available for travel shoots across Rwanda and East Africa.
